allow: Bash(sqlite3 /Users/david/Code/wuwa-rotation-builder/.local/data/game-data.db "SELECT id, capability_json FROM capabilities WHERE skill_id = 1197;")

Bash(sqlite3 /Users/david/Code/wuwa-rotation-builder/.local/data/game-data.db "UPDATE capabilities SET capability_json = json_set\(capability_json, ''$.damageInstances[0].motionValue'', 18.8075\), updated_at = strftime\(''%s'', ''now''\) WHERE id = 2318;")
Bash(sqlite3 /Users/david/Code/wuwa-rotation-builder/.local/data/game-data.db "SELECT capability_json FROM capabilities WHERE capability_json LIKE ''%resolveWith%'' LIMIT 3")
Bash(sqlite3 /Users/david/Code/wuwa-rotation-builder/.local/data/game-data.db "SELECT capability_json FROM capabilities WHERE capability_json LIKE ''%parameterConfigs%'' LIMIT 3")

Bash(sqlite3 /Users/david/Code/wuwa-rotation-builder/.local/data/game-data.db "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total, SUM\(CASE WHEN capability_json LIKE ''%resolveWith%'' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as has_resolveWith, SUM\(CASE WHEN capability_json LIKE ''%parameterConfigs%'' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as has_parameterConfigs FROM capabilities")

Bash(sqlite3 /Users/david/Code/wuwa-rotation-builder/.local/data/game-data.db "SELECT c.id, c.name, e.name as entity_name FROM capabilities c JOIN skills s ON c.skill_id = s.id JOIN entities e ON s.entity_id = e.id WHERE c.name IN \(''Base HP'', ''Base ATK'', ''Base DEF''\) AND e.type = ''character'';")

Bash(sqlite3 /Users/david/Code/wuwa-rotation-builder/.local/data/game-data.db "DELETE FROM capabilities WHERE name IN \(''Base HP'', ''Base ATK'', ''Base DEF''\) AND skill_id IN \(SELECT s.id FROM skills s JOIN entities e ON s.entity_id = e.id WHERE e.type = ''character''\); SELECT changes\(\) || '' rows deleted'';")

Bash(sqlite3 /Users/david/Code/wuwa-rotation-builder/.local/data/game-data.db "SELECT c.id, c.name, c.capability_json FROM capabilities c JOIN skills s ON c.skill_id = s.id JOIN entities e ON s.entity_id = e.id WHERE e.name = ''Shorekeeper'' AND s.origin_type = ''Base Stats'' ORDER BY c.id;")
